name: Chocolate-Chocolate Chippers
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 0:20
Place half of the chocolate morsels in the top of a double boiler.
Bring water to a boil. Reduce heat to low and cook until the chocolate melts.
Set aside to cool. Combine flour, baking powder, and salt; set aside.
In a large bowl, cream shortening with sugar using an electric mixer on medium speed.
Gradually add cooled chocolate mixture, egg, and vanilla extract, beating well.
Add milk and mix well. Gradually add dry ingredients and beat until smooth.
Stir in the remaining chocolate morsels and walnuts.
Drop dough by heaping teaspoonfuls onto lightly greased cookie sheets.
Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes or until set. Carefully transfer cookies to wire racks to cool (cookies will be soft).
Yield: about 5-1/2 dozen.
